title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz General Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
